detectors.description: MiniMeToken.claimTokens(address) (DTXToken.sol#1083-1103) ignores return value by token.transfer(controller,balance) (DTXToken.sol#1099)
MiniMeToken.isContract(address) (DTXToken.sol#1023-1037) is declared view but contains assembly code
detectors.markdown: [MiniMeToken.isContract(address)](DTXToken.sol#L1023-L1037) is declared view but contains assembly code

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (DTXToken.sol#525-559):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)) (DTXToken.sol#547)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (DTXToken.sol#553)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (DTXToken.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (DTXToken.sol#573-579)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (DTXToken.sol#525-559)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (DTXToken.sol#375-405)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](DTXToken.sol#L525-L559):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount))](DTXToken.sol#L547)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](DTXToken.sol#L553)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](DTXToken.sol#L241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](DTXToken.sol#L573-L579)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](DTXToken.sol#L525-L559)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](DTXToken.sol#L375-L405)

detectors.description:
Controlled.changeController(address) (DTXToken.sol#31-35) should emit an event for: 
	- controller = _newController (DTXToken.sol#33)

	- token.transfer(controller,balance) (DTXToken.sol#1099)

	- ClaimedTokens(_token,controller,balance) (DTXToken.sol#1101)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (DTXToken.sol#421-497):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number) (DTXToken.sol#449)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (DTXToken.sol#677)
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount)) (DTXToken.sol#463)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number) (DTXToken.sol#481)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (DTXToken.sol#677)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (DTXToken.sol#491)

It is used by:
